content.text:
*"For we are God's handiwork, created in Christ Jesus 
to do good works, which God prepared in advance for us to do."*{Ephesians 2:10}{The number of permutations of $n$ distinct objects is $n$ factorial.}{Jakob Bernoulli}

A **permutation** is an arrangement of objects 
where order matters.

content.title: Permutation
content.content:
A **permutation** of a set is an ordering of its elements. The 
number of permutations of $n$ distinct objects is:
\[ n! = n \times (n-1) \times (n-2) \times \cdots \times 2 \times 1 \]

content.title: Arranging books
content.problem: How many ways can 5 books be arranged on a shelf?

content.text: Often we want to arrange only some of the objects.

content.title: $r$-Permutation
content.content:
An **$r$-permutation** of $n$ objects is an ordered arrangement of 
$r$ of the $n$ objects. The number of $r$-permutations is:
\[ P(n, r) = \frac{n!}{(n-r)!} = n(n-1)(n-2)\cdots(n-r+1) \]

content.title: Race finishers
content.problem:
In a race with 10 runners, how many ways can gold, silver, and bronze 
be awarded?

content.title: Seating
content.problem: How many ways can 6 people be seated in a row of 10 chairs?

content.text: When objects are not distinct, we must avoid overcounting.

content.title: Permutations of a Multiset
content.content:
The number of permutations of $n$ objects where there are $n_1$ copies 
of type 1, $n_2$ copies of type 2, ..., $n_k$ copies of type $k$ (with 
$n_1 + n_2 + \cdots + n_k = n$) is:
\[ \frac{n!}{n_1! \cdot n_2! \cdots n_k!} \]
content.label: Theorem

content.title: Rearranging letters
content.problem: How many distinct rearrangements of MISSISSIPPI?

content.title: Circular Permutations
content.content: The number of ways to arrange $n$ distinct objects in a circle is $(n-1)!$.
content.label: Theorem

content.text:
In a circle, rotations are considered the same arrangement. We "fix" 
one object and arrange the remaining $n-1$.

content.title: Round table seating
content.problem: How many ways can 6 people sit at a round table?

marginNotes.text:
But in fact God has placed the 
parts in the body, every one of them, just as He wanted them to be.
